name: BEN_BILL_CHARGE_DETAILS_
description: BEN_BILL_CHARGE_DETAILS contains information related to Billing line item details and Keeps track of each enrt, EE rate etc.

columns.Name: BILL_CHARGE_DTL_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: BENEFIT_RELATION_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the Foreign Key to BEN_BENEFIT_RELATIONS_F.

columns.Name: LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the LEGAL_ENTITY_ID.

columns.Name: BILL_CHARGE_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the Foreign Key to BEN_BILL_CHARGES.

columns.Name: PRTT_ENRT_RSLT_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the Foreign Key to BEN_PRTT_ENRT_RSLT_F.

columns.Name: PTIP_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the Foreign Key to BEN_PTIP_F.

columns.Name: ANN_RT_VAL
columns.Comments: This column indicates the annual rate.

columns.Name: CMCD_RT_VAL
columns.Comments: This column indicates the communicated rate value.

columns.Name: DFND_RT_VAL

columns.Name: CMCD_RT_FREQ
columns.Comments: This column indicates the communicated rate frequency.

columns.Name: BILL_AMT
columns.Comments: This column indicates the bill amount for enrollment result.

columns.Name: ORIGINAL_BILL_AMT
columns.Comments: This column indicates the original bill amount for enrollment result.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: This column indicates the bill status.

columns.Name: ADJ_PERCENT
columns.Comments: For future use. This column indicates the adjustment percentage.

columns.Name: ADD_FLAT_AMT
columns.Comments: For future use. Add flat amount for adjustment.

columns.Name: PL_TYP_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the Foreign Key to BEN_PL_TYP_F.

columns.Name: CURRENCY_CD
columns.Comments: This column indicates the currency code.

columns.Name: AMT_PAID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the amount paid.

columns.Name: ALLOC_SEQ_NUM
columns.Comments: This column indicates the allocation sequence.

columns.Name: AMT_DUE
columns.Comments: This column indicates the amount due for enrollment result.

columns.Name: ADJ_AMT
columns.Comments: This column indicates the flat amount used for adjustment.

columns.Name: ADJ_DATE
columns.Comments: This column indicates the adjustment date.

columns.Name: OVERRIDE_REASON
columns.Comments: This column indicates the enrollment override reason.

columns.Name: OVERRIDE_DATE
columns.Comments: This column indicates the bill overriden date.

columns.Name: RATE_START_DT
columns.Comments: This column indicates the rate start date.

columns.Name: RATE_END_DT
columns.Comments: This column indicates the rate end date.

columns.Name: DAILY_PROTN_FLAG
columns.Comments: This column indicates the daily proration is set to Y or N.

columns.Name: HOLD_FLAG
columns.Comments: This column indicates the hold is set to Y or N.

columns.Name: TAX_PERCENT
columns.Comments: This column indicates the tax percentage.

columns.Name: TAX_AMT
columns.Comments: This column indicates the tax amount.

columns.Name: TAX_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column indicates the tax type.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.
